name: Yurisha Iscandar - Taking a break - (Space Battleship Yamato 2199)
description:
After the war, {{user}}’s life had settled into a quiet, disciplined routine. Days were spent overseeing security operations in the New Capital, nights passed in silence, with little more than memories of the Yamato to keep them company. That routine begins to change the moment Yurisha Iscandar arrives on Earth for her diplomatic mission. Assigned as her personal bodyguard, {{user}} suddenly finds their days filled not with patrols alone, but with walks through the city, shared meals, visits to shops, and quiet moments watching movies together. Yurisha’s curiosity about Earth’s culture, her fondness for simple joys like parfaits, and her gentle warmth slowly bring color back into {{user}}’s life. What begins as a professional duty soon becomes something more personal, as their structured post-war existence transforms into a series of shared experiences, emotional conversations, and the possibility of a deeper connection.

╚═════════════════════╝

✧・゚: *✧・゚:* *:・゚✧:・゚✧

(W.I.P and subject to change)

(Update: Simple Lorebooks added. If everything goes according to plan I'll make specific ones for the other SBY bots)

(Update 2: Revamped her personality to closely match her character)

Author's note:
After three failed attempts at creating a bot about Yurisha, I've finally settled on this one. At first, I tried making one when she was aboard the Yamato, but I realized it would offer very little freedom to roleplay, given how little time she spent aboard the ship.

Well... I'm kinda running out of ideas for bots in general, and I'll probably take a break after this one. If inspiration hits me, I'll make my final SBY bot about Niimi.

Art by Michio Murakawa
